📊 Dashboard 🔑 IFlow Roles

📋 Deployment JSON Template

New JSON format with per-environment overrides. One file per package, containing this section for each IFlow.
💡 Replace <your-iflow-artifact-id> and <Your IFlow Name> with actual values.
Place this file at: IntegrationPackages/<PackageFolder>/Configuration/Deployment_INTEGRATION_FLOW.json
